source_issue.title: z3c.form widgetTemplate manual override example make no sense

summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue identifies a problem with the manual override example for `z3c.form` widget templates in the [Plone documentation](https://github.com/plone/documentation/blob/cf62b0a919c639592e7b59c781148e8ac2d0ca0f/develop/plone/forms/z3c.form.rst). The code provided is not functioning correctly due to a local variable issue with the `template`, which may need to be `self.template`. There are also deprecated imports that need updating.

## What needs to be done
1. Fix the example code so that the `template` is assigned properly (possibly to `self.template`).
2. Update deprecated imports at the top of the code.

## Helpful background
The `z3c.form` framework is used in Plone for creating forms. The `NamedFileWidget` class is a specific widget type, and the example aims to showcase how to customize the display template. This issue is categorized as needing help and documentation.

## Good first steps
1. Review the mentioned code in the documentation to understand the current implementation.
2. Modify the code based on the suggestions above.
3. Consider preparing a pull request (PR) to submit your changes. Coordination with the author or other contributors may be beneficial for review.
```
